title: Bryodesma humifusum
taxonomy: Bryodesma humifusum is classified as a species of moss within the family Mniaceae. This family is part of the subclass Bryidae, which falls under the class Bryopsida. The subclass Bryidae and class Bryopsida are part of the division Bryophyta, which is a group of non-vascular plants. The division Bryophyta, along with other related groups, is part of the larger kingdom Plantae. This complex classification system allows for a detailed and organized understanding of the plant's relationships and characteristics.
